name: setup claude installs Claude Code hooks
body: bsg setup claude writes hooks to .claude/settings.json: SessionStart runs bsg prime, PreCompact and Stop run bsg prime --compact, PreToolUse on Edit|Write runs bsg check-file. Adds .bsg/README.md reference to CLAUDE.md. --remove strips BSG hooks while preserving non-BSG hooks. --dry-run shows output without writing. All hook commands fail silently (2>/dev/null || true).
